requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and DOSM Conformity as International Baseline for Laos BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619及DOSM合格评定作为老挝BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619及DOSM合格評定作為寮國BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: Laos does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation specifically requiring IEC 62619 pre-shipment certification in the manner of Saudi Arabia's SABER system or the EU Battery Regulation. DOSM (Department of Standardisation and Metrology, under MOIC — Ministry of Industry and Commerce) is the national standards and conformity body and administers the LAO-Q mark (Lao Quality mark). DOSM is progressively adopting IEC standards into the Laos national standard system; however, a confirmed DOSM Technical Regulation specifically mandating IEC 62619 or equivalent pre-market conformity assessment for stationary BESS cells and systems had not been confirmed from official public sources as of the dataset date. Exporters should verify the current DOSM regulated-product list directly with DOSM before shipment. In practice, IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules, and MEM concession conditions and EDL grid-connection agreements for utility-scale and C&I BESS projects in Laos are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite. IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is the internationally expected documentation baseline, regardless of whether a formal DOSM pre-market mandatory requirement has been confirmed. Chinese BRI-related project arrangements in Laos do not substitute for formal DOSM or MEM/EDL safety compliance.
summary.zh: 老挝目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，专门要求以沙特阿拉伯SABER体系或欧盟《电池法规》的方式进行IEC 62619装运前认证。DOSM（标准化和计量局，隶属于工商部）是老挝国家标准和合格评定机构，管理LAO-Q标志（老挝质量标志）。DOSM正逐步将IEC标准纳入老挝国家标准体系；然而，截至本数据集日期，专门强制要求固定式BESS电芯和系统进行IEC 62619或等效上市前合格评定的DOSM技术法规尚未从官方公开来源得到确认。出口商在出货前应直接向DOSM核实现行受监管产品清单。实践中，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，老挝公用事业规模和工商业BESS项目的能矿部特许条件和EDL并网协议，预计将以IEC 62619合规作为技术前提。来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62619测试证据是国际预期文件基准，无论DOSM正式上市前强制要求是否得到确认均如此。老挝的中国「一带一路」相关项目安排不能替代正式DOSM或能矿部/EDL安全合规。
summary.zht: 寮國目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，專門要求以沙特阿拉伯SABER體系或歐盟《電池法規》的方式進行IEC 62619裝運前認證。DOSM（標準化和計量局，隸屬於工商部）是寮國國家標準和合格評定機構，管理LAO-Q標誌（寮國質量標誌）。DOSM正逐步將IEC標準納入寮國國家標準體系；然而，截至本數據集日期，專門強制要求固定式BESS電芯和系統進行IEC 62619或等效上市前合格評定的DOSM技術法規尚未從官方公開來源得到確認。出口商在出貨前應直接向DOSM核實現行受監管產品清單。實踐中，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，寮國公用事業規模和工商業BESS項目的能礦部特許條件和EDL併網協議，預計將以IEC 62619合規作為技術前提。來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62619測試證據是國際預期文件基準，無論DOSM正式上市前強制要求是否得到確認均如此。寮國的中國「一帶一路」相關項目安排不能替代正式DOSM或能礦部/EDL安全合規。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Laos project specifications and MEM/EDL agreements)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Considerations — Hazard Identification, Risk Assessment and Risk Mitigation (system-level safety standard referenced in project specifications)

DOSM (Department of Standardisation and Metrology, Lao PDR) — national standards and LAO-Q conformity mark; verify current regulated-product list directly; no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific Technical Regulation as of dataset date
MEM (Ministry of Energy and Mines, Lao PDR) — technical safety conditions in BESS project concession/permit agreements

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in Laos project technical specifications or DOSM conformity assessment. The prevalence of Chinese BESS equipment in Laos under BRI arrangements does not exempt Chinese suppliers from formal DOSM or MEM/EDL safety compliance requirements. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance, for use in MEM project documentation and EDL technical review.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准未与IEC 62619协调，不被老挝项目技术规格或DOSM合格评定接受为替代依据。中国BESS设备在「一带一路」安排下于老挝的普遍存在，不豁免中国供应商正式DOSM或能矿部/EDL安全合规要求。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据，用于能矿部项目文件和EDL技术审查。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準未與IEC 62619協調，不被寮國項目技術規格或DOSM合格評定接受為替代依據。中國BESS設備在「一帶一路」安排下於寮國的普遍存在，不豁免中國供應商正式DOSM或能礦部/EDL安全合規要求。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據，用於能礦部項目文件和EDL技術審查。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: MEM concession conditions and EDL grid-connection agreements reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules in Laos. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications. The BRI prevalence of Chinese BESS equipment in Laos does not create a formal equivalence pathway. Exporters should: (a) verify the current DOSM regulated-product list for any mandatory LAO-Q or pre-shipment conformity assessment obligation covering BESS cells or systems; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Laos BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification, MEM concession conditions, or EDL connection agreement before committing to a test programme; (d) prepare IEC 62933-5-1 system-level risk assessment documentation as the expected international safety evidence baseline for MEM/EDL project submission.
gap.zh: 关键差距：老挝能矿部特许条件和EDL并网协议将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格接受为替代依据。中国BESS设备在老挝的「一带一路」普遍性不产生正式等效路径。出口商应：（a）核实现行DOSM受监管产品清单，确认是否存在涵盖BESS电芯或系统的强制性LAO-Q或装运前合格评定义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至老挝BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格、能矿部特许条件或EDL并网协议中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）准备IEC 62933-5-1系统级风险评估文件，作为能矿部/EDL项目提交的预期国际安全证据基准。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：寮國能礦部特許條件和EDL併網協議將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格接受為替代依據。中國BESS設備在寮國的「一帶一路」普遍性不產生正式等效路徑。出口商應：（a）核實現行DOSM受監管產品清單，確認是否存在涵蓋BESS電芯或系統的強制性LAO-Q或裝運前合格評定義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至寮國BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格、能礦部特許條件或EDL併網協議中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）準備IEC 62933-5-1系統級風險評估文件，作為能礦部/EDL項目提交的預期國際安全證據基準。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where MEM or EDL project specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; DOSM mandatory regulatory obligation specifically for BESS has not been confirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with DOSM; LAO-Q conformity mark requirements should be confirmed for the specific product category
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

source.publisher: DOSM (Department of Standardisation and Metrology, Lao PDR — under MOIC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Laos as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Laos project specifications, MEM concession conditions, and EDL connection agreements. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Laos project acceptance. The prevalence of Chinese BESS equipment under BRI arrangements does not substitute for formal DOSM or MEM/EDL safety compliance. Verify DOSM current regulated-product scope and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with DOSM, MEM, and EDL before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，老挝尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是老挝项目规格、能矿部特许条件和EDL并网协议中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足老挝项目验收要求。中国BESS设备在「一带一路」安排下的普遍存在不能替代正式DOSM或能矿部/EDL安全合规。出货前请向DOSM核实现行受监管产品范围，并向DOSM、能矿部和EDL确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，寮國尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是寮國項目規格、能礦部特許條件和EDL併網協議中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足寮國項目驗收要求。中國BESS設備在「一帶一路」安排下的普遍存在不能替代正式DOSM或能礦部/EDL安全合規。出貨前請向DOSM核實現行受監管產品範圍，並向DOSM、能礦部和EDL確認IEC 62619證據要求。
